title: Syrian Lamb Wrap
description: A flavorful and spicy wrap filled with lamb, herbs, and spices, inspired by Syrian cuisine.
instructions: 2. In a small bowl, mix together pepper paste, cilantro, garlic, lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
3. Rub the lamb slices with the spicy mixture, making sure they're evenly coated.
4. Grill the lamb slices for 3-4 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
5. Meanwhile, warm the bread by wrapping it in foil and heating it in the oven for a few minutes.
6. Assemble the wrap by placing the grilled lamb slices on the bread, followed by any additional toppings you like.
7. Fold the bread in half to enclose the filling, and serve immediately.
